headline: Memory chip stocks fall into a bull market amid latest tech sell-off
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the memory chip trade — particularly the intraday performances of Micron Technology (MU), SK Hynix (000660.KS), and Samsung (005930.KS) — as these three big names have seemingly dragged the sector into a bear market.

headline: Salesforce (CRM) Pushes Further Into AI And Data, Is The Stock Cheap?
summary: Salesforce (CRM) is back in the spotlight after recent news around its push into enterprise AI and data management, highlighted by the integration of Informatica and an upward revision to AI related revenue guidance. See our latest analysis for Salesforce. Salesforce's AI and data story is unfolding against a weak share price backdrop, with the stock down 34.69% year to date on a share price basis and the 1 year total shareholder return declining 38.08%, while a 4.89% 7 day share price gain...
